title: Meet the Iraq player set to make history for Pakistan
summary: Zidane Iqbal, a former Manchester United player, will make history when he plays for Iraq this summer, becoming the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a men's World Cup.
full_text: Zidane Iqbal, a former Manchester United player, will make history when he plays for Iraq this summer, becoming the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a men's World Cup.
why: A former Manchester United player will make history for Pakistan.
headline: History Made: Zidane Iqbal to Play for Iraq in World Cup
